systemic_low_risk_broadening_equation.strength_term: A_sys_broad = mix(S_sys_enlarge_score, R_sys_enlarge, 1 - P_sys_enlarge, M_brain_direct_v29, R_train_v35)
systemic_low_risk_broadening_equation.learning_term: L_sys_broad = mix(L_sys_enlarge, S_sys_enlarge_score, D_feature_v29, B_plastic_v35, R_train_v35)
systemic_low_risk_broadening_equation.system_term: M_sys_broad = A_sys_broad + S_sys_broad + R_sys_broad + L_sys_broad - P_sys_broad

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk zone broadening validation checks whether systemic low-risk enlargement begins broadening into a wider low-risk regime instead of only growing the previous band.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this broadening still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
